summary: Script is well-designed (modular, proper error handling, set -euo pipefail), but workflow has critical gaps: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA—missing supply-chain security best practice; (2) workflow references undefined fixtures/ dir—no sample files provided; (3) task requires saving act output to act-result.txt, workflow doesn't produce it; (4) markdown parsing (lines 60–68) is fragile—assumes exact table/list formatting, will break if rendered markdown changes; (5) missing version comments on actions. Script itself reasonable, but deliverable incomplete and wouldn't pass actionlint or run via act without fixtures.
